title: Bug in subselect (or condition)
poc: INSERT INTO "sys"."unitTestDontDelete" VALUES (NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL);

with "cp_t" as
 (
   select
     "cn_t"."A",
     "cn_t"."B",
     "cn_t"."C",
     "cn_t"."D"
   from
     "unitTestDontDelete" as "cn_t"
   where
     (
       "B" is null
       or "B"   <> 8
     )
 )
 select
   (
     select
       coalesce(sum("B"), 0)
     from
       "cp_t" as "cr_t"
     where
       (
         "cr_t"."C" >=
         (
           select
             coalesce(MEDIAN("B"),0)
           from
             "cp_t" as "cq_t"
           where
             (
               "cq_t"."A" = "cp_t"."A"
               or
               (
                 "cq_t"."A"     is null
                 and "cp_t"."A" is null
               )
             )
         )
         or
         (
           "cr_t"."C" is null
           and
           (
             select
               coalesce(MEDIAN("B"),0)
             from
               "cp_t" as "cq_t"
             where
               (
                 "cq_t"."A" = "cp_t"."A"
                 or
                 (
                   "cq_t"."A"     is null
                   and "cp_t"."A" is null
                 )
               )
           )
           is null
         )
       )
   )
   as "co_f1"
 from
   "cp_t";

with "cp_t" as
 (
   select
     "cn_t"."A",
     "cn_t"."B",
     "cn_t"."C",
     "cn_t"."D"
   from
     "unitTestDontDelete" as "cn_t"
   where
     (
       "B" is null
       or "B"   <> 8
     )
 )
 select
   (
     select
       coalesce(sum("B"), 0)
     from
       "cp_t" as "cr_t"
     where
       (
         "cr_t"."C" >=
         (
           select
             coalesce(MEDIAN("B"),0) 
           from
             "cp_t" as "cq_t"
           where
             (
               "cq_t"."A" = "cp_t"."A"
               or
               (
                 "cq_t"."A"     is null
                 and "cp_t"."A" is null
               )
             )
         )
       )
   )
   as "co_f1"
 from
   "cp_t";
key_bug_features: Subselect with null or condition on column B
bug_features_seed: SELECT * FROM "unitTestFuzz" WHERE "Y" IS NULL OR "Z" > (SELECT AVG("Z") FROM "unitTestFuzz" WHERE "W" IS NOT NULL);
